summary: The user is seeking information on upcoming charity events in Pleasanton, California, specifically focusing on walks and cycling events that benefit children, education, and healthcare. They have decided to form a team named "Steps for St. Jude" for the St. Jude Walk/Run to End Childhood Cancer, setting a fundraising goal of $1,000 and planning to reach out to local businesses for sponsorships.
facts: The user participated in the Cancer Research Walkathon last month, raising $250 in donations from friends and family, surpassing their goal of $200. The user is based in the 94563 zip code in Pleasanton, California. The user is interested in the St. Jude Walk/Run to End Childhood Cancer, scheduled for September 26, 2023, at the Alameda County Fairgrounds. The user plans to create a team Facebook page for "Steps for St. Jude" to share updates and encourage fundraising. The user is considering reaching out to local businesses for sponsorships or donations to support their team's fundraising efforts. The user has set a team fundraising goal of $1,000 for the St. Jude Walk/Run to End Childhood Cancer.
